---
name: pdf
description: "Work with PDF files for extraction, summarization, and structured analysis. Use when user asks to read forms, parse sections, collect key fields, or transform PDF content."
---

# PDF

## When to use
- Extract text, fields, or structured data from PDFs.
- Summarize long PDF documents quickly.
- Identify required actions from forms/contracts/spec docs.

## Procedure
1. Identify the target PDF and extraction goal.
2. Parse relevant pages/sections and keep source context.
3. Return concise structured findings tied to the document.
4. Highlight ambiguities or unreadable segments explicitly.
